38	    public static void printSolutions(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions, boolean isSimple,
39	            Result<List<ModuleInst>> result) {
40	        if (solutions == null || solutions.isEmpty()) {
41	            log.info("No solutions found");
42	            return;
43	        }
44	
45	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
46	        sb.append(System.lineSeparator()).append("******************************************")
47	                .append(System.lineSeparator());
48	        // 打印缩语解释
49	        sb.append("1.Abbreviation explanation:").append(System.lineSeparator());
50	
51	        // 1. shortCodes(P1:Size, P2:Color,PT1:part1)
52	        try {
53	            sb.append("1.1. ").append(module.getProgObjShortCodeMemo()).append(System.lineSeparator());
54	        } catch (Exception e) {
55	            log.warn("Failed to get ProgObjShortCodeMemo: {}", e.getMessage());
56	            sb.append("1.1. <failed to get>").append(System.lineSeparator());
57	        }
58	        // 2. Attrs(V:value, H:isHidden, Q:qty)
59	        sb.append("1.2. Attrs(V:value, H:isHidden, Q:qty,S:isSelected)").append(System.lineSeparator());
60	        // 3. Other Variable shortName
61	        sb.append("1.3. Other Variable shortName:").append(System.lineSeparator());
62	        try {
63	            printOthers(solutions, sb);
64	        } catch (Exception e) {
65	            log.warn("Failed to print Others: {}", e.getMessage());
66	        }
67	
68	        // 4. Priority Attribute shortName
69	        try {
70	            sb.append("1.4. Priority Attribute shortName:").append(solutions.get(0).getPriorityAttrShortCodeStr())
71	                    .append(System.lineSeparator());
72	        } catch (Exception e) {
73	            log.warn("Failed to get PriorityAttrShortCodeStr: {}", e.getMessage());
74	            sb.append("1.4. Priority Attribute shortName: <failed to get>").append(System.lineSeparator());
75	        }
76	
77	        sb.append("2.Solutions:").append(System.lineSeparator());
78	        // 打印解
79	        try {
80	            printSolutionList(solutions, isSimple, sb);
81	        } catch (Exception e) {
82	            log.warn("Failed to print solution list: {}", e.getMessage());
83	        }
84	        sb.append(System.lineSeparator()).append("******************************************")

116	    private static void printSolutionList(List<ModuleInst> solutions, boolean isSimple, StringBuilder sb) {
117	        int max = 20; // 最多打印20个
118	        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
119	            if (i < max) {
120	                sb.append(" S_").append(i + 1).append(": ").append(solutions.get(i).toShortString(isSimple))
121	                        .append(System.lineSeparator());
122	            }
123	            if (i == max) {
124	                sb.append(" ... remaining solutions: ").append(solutions.size() - max).append(System.lineSeparator());
125	                break;
126	            }
127	        }
128	    }
129

135	     */
136	    private static void printOthers(List<ModuleInst> solutions, StringBuilder sb) {
137	        if (!solutions.isEmpty()) {
138	            ModuleInst firstSolution = solutions.get(0);
139	            Object otherVarsMemo = firstSolution.getExtAttrs().get(ModuleBaseInst.OTHER_VARIABLES_MEMO_KEY);
140	            if (otherVarsMemo instanceof Map) {
141	                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
142	                Map<String, OtherVar> otherVarMap = (Map<String, OtherVar>) otherVarsMemo;
143	                for (Map.Entry<String, OtherVar> entry : otherVarMap.entrySet()) {
144	                    OtherVar otherVar = entry.getValue();
145	                    sb.append(" ").append(otherVar.getShortCode()).append(":").append(otherVar.getCode())
146	                            .append(System.lineSeparator());
147	                }
148	            }
149	        }
150	    }
151	}

220	     * 根据多个参数值进行推理（可变参数版本）
221	     * 
222	     * @param paraCodeValuePairs 参数代码和值的交替数组，格式：paraCode1, value1, paraCode2,
223	     *                           value2, ...
224	     * @return 推理结果
225	     */
226	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParasByPara(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
227	        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
228	        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
229	        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
230	
231	        // 复用公共方法处理参数
232	        req.setPreParaInsts(toPreParas(paraCodeValuePairs));
233	
234	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
235	        setResult(result);
236	        setSolutions(result.getData());
237	        return getSolutions();
238	    }

242	     */
243	    protected ProgammableInstAssert solutions(int index) {
244	        if (getSolutions() == null || index >= getSolutions().size()) {
245	            throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException("Solution index out of bounds: " + index);

247	        ModuleInst solution = getSolutions().get(index);

270	     * 获取结果断言对象，用于验证执行结果
271	     */
272	    protected ResultAssert resultAssert() {
273	        if (getResult() == null) {
274	            throw new IllegalStateException("Inference not executed yet, cannot get result assertion");

279	    /**
280	     * 检查解决方案列表中是否包含指定的字符串
281	     * 遍历所有解决方案的 toShortString 输出，检查是否包含指定的子字符串
282	     * 如果找不到匹配的解决方案，则抛出 AssertionError
283	     * 
284	     * @param expectedStr 期望包含的字符串
285	     * @throws AssertionError 如果找不到包含指定字符串的解决方案
286	     */
287	    protected void soluContain(String expectedStr) {
288	        if (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty()) {
289	            throw new AssertionError("No solutions found, cannot check if contains: " + expectedStr);
290	        }
291	        if (expectedStr == null || expectedStr.isEmpty()) {
292	            return;
293	        }
294	        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
295	            String solutionStr = solution.toShortString(true);
296	            if (solutionStr != null && solutionStr.contains(expectedStr)) {
297	                log.info("Found solution containing '{}': {}", expectedStr, solutionStr);
298	                return;
299	            }
300	        }
301	        // 构建错误消息，包含所有解决方案的字符串表示
302	        StringBuilder errorMsg = new StringBuilder();
303	        errorMsg.append("No solution found containing: ").append(expectedStr);
304	        errorMsg.append("\nAvailable solutions:");
305	        for (int i = 0; i < getSolutions().size(); i++) {
306	            String solutionStr = getSolutions().get(i).toShortString(true);
307	            errorMsg.append("\n  S_").append(i + 1).append(": ").append(solutionStr);
308	        }
309	        throw new AssertionError(errorMsg.toString());
310	    }
311	
312	    /**
313	     * 校验满足条件conditionExpr解的个数是否等于expectSolutionNum
314	     * 
315	     * @param conditionExpr     条件表达式，格式如："Color:Red,TShirt1:2"
316	     * @param expectSolutionNum 期望的解决方案数量
317	     */
318	    protected void assertSolutionNum(String conditionExpr, int expectSolutionNum) {
319	        // 如果expectSolutionNum为0，则不进行验证
320	        if (expectSolutionNum == 0 && (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty())) {
321	            return;
322	        }
323	        if (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty()) {
324	            throw new AssertionError("No solutions available for verification");
325	        }
326	        // 解析条件表达式
327	        Map<String, String> kvMap = parseConditionExpr(conditionExpr);
328	
329	        // 构建条件对象列表
330	        List<ConditionElement> conditionElements = buildConditionElements(kvMap);
331	
332	        // 计算实际匹配的解决方案数量
333	        int actualMatchSolutionNum = countMatchingSolutions(conditionElements);
334	
335	        // 比较实际数量和期望数量
336	        if (actualMatchSolutionNum != expectSolutionNum) {
337	            throw new AssertionError(String.format(
338	                    "解决方案数量不匹配，期望: %d，实际: %d，条件: %s",
339	                    expectSolutionNum, actualMatchSolutionNum, conditionExpr));
340	        }
341	
342	        log.info("Solution count verification passed, condition: {}, count: {}", conditionExpr, actualMatchSolutionNum);
343	    }
344	
345	    /**
346	     * 解析条件表达式
347	     * 格式："Color:Red,TShirt1:2" -> {"Color":"Red", "TShirt1":"2"}
348	     * 
349	     * @param conditionExpr 条件表达式字符串
350	     * @return 解析后的键值对映射
351	     */
352	    private Map<String, String> parseConditionExpr(String conditionExpr) {
353	        Map<String, String> kvMap = new HashMap<>();
354	        String[] pairs = conditionExpr.split(",");
355	
356	        for (String pair : pairs) {
357	            String[] kv = pair.split(":");
358	            if (kv.length == 2) {
359	                kvMap.put(kv[0].trim(), kv[1].trim());
360	            } else {
361	                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid condition expression format: " + pair);
362	            }
363	        }
364	
365	        return kvMap;
366	    }
367	
368	    /**
369	     * 构建条件元素列表
370	     * 
371	     * @param kvMap 键值对映射
372	     * @return 条件元素列表
373	     */
374	    private List<ConditionElement> buildConditionElements(Map<String, String> kvMap) {
375	        List<ConditionElement> elements = new ArrayList<>();
376	
377	        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : kvMap.entrySet()) {
378	            String key = entry.getKey();
379	            String value = entry.getValue();
380	
381	            ConditionElement element = createConditionElement(key, value);
382	            elements.add(element);
383	        }
384	
385	        return elements;
386	    }
387	
388	    /**
389	     * 创建条件元素
390	     * 
391	     * @param key   键
392	     * @param value 值
393	     * @return 条件元素
394	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 当找不到参数或部件时
395	     */
396	    private ConditionElement createConditionElement(String key, String value) {
397	        // 在module.paras中查找
398	        java.util.Optional<Para> paraOpt = getModule().getPara(key);
399	        if (paraOpt.isPresent()) {
400	            return createParaConditionElement(key, value, paraOpt.get());
401	        }
402	
403	        // 在module.parts中查找
404	        IPart partOpt = getModule().getPart(key);
405	        if (partOpt != null) {
406	            return createPartConditionElement(key, value);
407	        }
408	
409	        // 都找不到，报错
410	        throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format(
411	                "Parameter or part not found in Module: %s", key));
412	    }
413	
414	    /**
415	     * 创建参数条件元素
416	     * 
417	     * @param key   键
418	     * @param value 值
419	     * @param para  参数对象
420	     * @return 条件元素
421	     */
422	    private ConditionElement createParaConditionElement(String key, String value, Para para) {
423	        String codeIdValue = ParaTypeHandler.getCodeIdValue(para, value);
424	        return new ConditionElement("para", key, codeIdValue);
425	    }
426	
427	    /**
428	     * 创建部件条件元素
429	     * 
430	     * @param key   键
431	     * @param value 值
432	     * @return 条件元素
433	     */
434	    private ConditionElement createPartConditionElement(String key, String value) {
435	        return new ConditionElement("part", key, value);
436	    }
437	
438	    /**
439	     * 计算匹配条件的解决方案数量
440	     * 
441	     * @param conditionElements 条件元素列表
442	     * @return 匹配的解决方案数量
443	     */
444	    private int countMatchingSolutions(List<ConditionElement> conditionElements) {
445	        int matchCount = 0;
446	
447	        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
448	            boolean isMatch = true;
449	
450	            for (ConditionElement element : conditionElements) {
451	                if ("para".equals(element.type)) {
452	                    // 对paraInst，比较value和paraInst.value
453	                    ParaInst paraInst = findParaInstByCode(solution, element.code);
454	                    if (paraInst == null || !element.value.equals(paraInst.getValue())) {
455	                        isMatch = false;
456	                        break;
457	                    }
458	                } else if ("part".equals(element.type)) {
459	                    // 对partInst，比较value和partInst.quantity
460	                    PartInst partInst = findPartInstByCode(solution, element.code);
461	                    if (partInst == null || !element.value.equals(String.valueOf(partInst.getQuantity()))) {
462	                        isMatch = false;
463	                        break;
464	                    }
465	                } else {
466	                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid condition element type: " + element.type);
467	                }
468	            }
469	
470	            if (isMatch) {
471	                matchCount++;
472	            }
473	        }
474	
475	        return matchCount;
476	    }
477	
478	    /**
479	     * 根据代码查找ParaInst
480	     * 
481	     * @param solution 模块实例
482	     * @param code     参数代码
483	     * @return 匹配的ParaInst，如果未找到则返回null
484	     */
485	    private ParaInst findParaInstByCode(ModuleInst solution, String code) {
486	        if (solution.getParas() == null) {
487	            return null;
488	        }
489	        return solution.getParas().stream()
490	                .filter(p -> code.equals(p.getCode()))
491	                .findFirst()
492	                .orElse(null);
493	    }
494	
495	    /**
496	     * 根据代码查找PartInst
497	     * 
498	     * @param solution 模块实例
499	     * @param code     部件代码
500	     * @return 匹配的PartInst，如果未找到则返回null
501	     */
502	    private PartInst findPartInstByCode(ModuleInst solution, String code) {
503	        if (solution.getParts() == null) {
504	            return null;
505	        }
506	        return solution.getParts().stream()
507	                .filter(p -> code.equals(p.getCode()))
508	                .findFirst()
509	                .orElse(null);
510	    }
511	
512	    /**
513	     * 根据参数代码值对构建ParaInst列表（公共方法）
514	     * 
515	     * @param paraCodeValuePairs 参数代码和值的交替数组
516	     * @return ParaInst列表
517	     */
518	    protected List<ParaInst> toPreParas(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
519	        if (paraCodeValuePairs.length % 2 != 0) {
520	            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
521	                    "Parameters must be in even numbers, format: paraCode1, value1, paraCode2, value2, ...");
522	        }
523	
524	        List<ParaInst> paraInsts = new ArrayList<>();
525	
526	        for (int i = 0; i < paraCodeValuePairs.length; i += 2) {
527	            String paraCode = paraCodeValuePairs[i];
528	            String value = paraCodeValuePairs[i + 1];
529	
530	            ParaInst paraInst = new ParaInst();
531	            paraInst.setCode(paraCode);
532	
533	            // 根据module.paras中的para.options，找到value对应的option
534	            Optional<Para> paraOpt = getModule().getPara(paraCode);
535	            if (!paraOpt.isPresent()) {
536	                throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format("Parameter %s does not exist", paraCode));
537	            }
538	            Para para = paraOpt.get();
539	            paraInst.setValue(ParaTypeHandler.getCodeIdValue(para, value));
540	            paraInsts.add(paraInst);
541	        }
542	
543	        return paraInsts;
544	    }
545	
546	    /**
547	     * 根据Part代码值对构建PartInst列表（公共方法）
548	     * 
549	     * @param partCodeValuePairs Part代码和值的交替数组
550	     * @return ParaInst列表
551	     */
552	    protected List<PartInst> toPreParts(String... partCodeValuePairs) {
553	        if (partCodeValuePairs.length % 2 != 0) {
554	            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
555	                    "Parts must be in even numbers, format: partCode1, value1, partCode2, value2, ...");
556	        }
557	
558	        List<PartInst> partInsts = new ArrayList<>();
559	
560	        for (int i = 0; i < partCodeValuePairs.length; i += 2) {
561	            String partCode = partCodeValuePairs[i];
562	            String value = partCodeValuePairs[i + 1];
563	
564	            PartInst partInst = new PartInst();
565	            partInst.setCode(partCode);
566	
567	            // 根据module.parts中
568	            IPart partOpt = getModule().getPart(partCode);
569	            if (partOpt == null) {
570	                throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format("Part %s does not exist", partCode));
571	            }
572	            partInst.setQuantity(Integer.parseInt(value));
573	            partInsts.add(partInst);
574	        }
575	
576	        return partInsts;
577	    }

579	    /**
580	     * 条件元素内部类
581	     */
582	    private static class ConditionElement {

584	        private final String type; // "para" 或 "part"
585	
586	        private final String code; // 代码
587	
588	        private final String value; // 值
589	
590	        ConditionElement(String type, String code, String value) {
591	            this.type = type;
592	            this.code = code;
593	            this.value = value;
594	        }
595	    }

619	    /**
620	     * 将字符串约束请求转换为PartConstraintReq列表
621	     *
622	     * @param partCategory 部件类别
623	     * @param strReqs      字符串约束请求数组，格式如："sd:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400"
624	     * @return PartConstraintReq列表
625	     */
626	    protected List<PartConstraintReq> toPartConstraintReqs(String partCategory, String... strReqs) {
627	        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = new ArrayList<>();
628	
629	        for (String strReq : strReqs) {
630	            PartConstraintReq req = new PartConstraintReq();
631	
632	            // Parse strategy syntax: [strategy=ASCENDING:price]
633	            String remainingStr = parseStrategyConfig(strReq, req);
634	
635	            // 解析格式：reqPartCategory:attrCode comparator value where condition
636	            // 示例："sd:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400"
637	            String[] categoryParts = remainingStr.split(":", 2);
638	            String reqPartCategory;
639	            String attrExprStr;
640	            if (categoryParts.length == 2) {
641	                reqPartCategory = categoryParts[0].trim();
642	                attrExprStr = categoryParts[1].trim();
643	            } else {
644	                // 如果没有:，则使用默认的partCategory
645	                reqPartCategory = partCategory;
646	                attrExprStr = remainingStr;
647	            }
648	            req.setPartCategoryCode(reqPartCategory);
649	
650	            // 解析属性表达式：支持三种场景
651	            // 场景1：仅有过滤条件，如 "where Speed=5400"
652	            // 场景2：仅有汇总条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5"
653	            // 场景3：同时有汇总条件和过滤条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400"
654	            parseAttrExpr(attrExprStr, req);
655	
656	            reqs.add(req);
657	        }
658	
659	        return reqs;
660	    }
661	
662	    /**
663	     * Parse strategy configuration from the constraint request string.
664	     * Syntax: [strategy=ASCENDING:price] or [strategy=DESCENDING:attrCode]
665	     *
666	     * @param strReq the full constraint request string
667	     * @param req    the PartConstraintReq to populate
668	     * @return the remaining string after removing strategy configuration
669	     */
670	    private String parseStrategyConfig(String strReq, PartConstraintReq req) {
671	        Pattern strategyPattern = Pattern.compile("\\[strategy=(ASCENDING|DESCENDING|UNSPECIFIED):(\\w+)\\]");
672	        Matcher matcher = strategyPattern.matcher(strReq);
673	        if (matcher.find()) {
674	            StrategyConfig config = new StrategyConfig();
675	            config.setStrategyType(StrategyType.valueOf(matcher.group(1)));
676	            config.setSortAttributeCode(matcher.group(2));
677	            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = new ArrayList<>();
678	            strategies.add(config);
679	            req.setDecisionStrategies(strategies);
680	            // Remove the strategy part from the string
681	            return matcher.replaceFirst("").trim();
682	        }
683	        return strReq;
684	    }
685	
686	    /**
687	     * 解析属性表达式为PartConstraintReq
688	     * 支持三种场景：
689	     * 场景1：仅有过滤条件，如 "where Speed=5400" -> attrWhereCondition="Speed=5400", attrComparator=null
690	     * 场景2：仅有汇总条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5" -> attrWhereCondition=null, attrType=Sum, attrCode=Capacity, attrComparator=">=", attrValue="5"
691	     * 场景3：同时有汇总条件和过滤条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400" -> 同时设置两个条件
692	     *
693	     * @param attrExpr 属性表达式（可能包含 where 子句）
694	     * @param req 部件约束请求对象，用于设置解析结果
695	     */
696	    protected void parseAttrExpr(String attrExpr, PartConstraintReq req) {
697	        String trimmedExpr = attrExpr.trim();
698	
699	        // 处理 where 子句（过滤条件）
700	        // 支持多种格式：",where XXX", "where XXX", ", where XXX"
701	        int whereIndex = -1;
702	        String whereCondition = null;
703	
704	        // 先尝试 " where " (前后都有空格)
705	        whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf(" where ");
706	        if (whereIndex >= 0) {
707	            whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 7).trim();
708	            trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
709	        } else {
710	            // 再尝试 "where " (前面没有空格)
711	            whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf("where ");
712	            if (whereIndex >= 0) {
713	                whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 6).trim();
714	                trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
715	            }
716	        }
717	
718	        if (whereCondition != null && !whereCondition.isEmpty()) {
719	            req.setAttrWhereCondition(whereCondition);
720	        }
721	
722	        // 解析汇总条件部分
723	        if (trimmedExpr.isEmpty()) {
724	            // 场景1：仅有过滤条件，没有汇总条件
725	            return;
726	        }
727	
728	        // 使用正则表达式解析：attrCode comparator value
729	        Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*(==|!=|<=|>=|<|>)\\s*(\\d+)");
730	        Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(trimmedExpr);
731	
732	        if (matcher.matches()) {
733	            String mergedAttrCode = matcher.group(1).trim();
734	            String[] mergedParts = mergedAttrCode.split(AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR);
735	            if (mergedParts.length == 2) {
736	                req.setAttrType(AttrParaType.valueOf(mergedParts[0]));
737	                req.setAttrCode(mergedParts[1]);
738	            } else {
739	                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
740	            }
741	            req.setAttrComparator(matcher.group(2).trim());
742	            req.setAttrValue(matcher.group(3).trim());
743	        } else {
744	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
745	        }
746	    }
747	
748	    /**
749	     * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
750	     * 
751	     * @param constraintReqs 约束请求字符串数组
752	     * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
753	     */
754	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs) {
755	        return inferRecommend("", constraintReqs);
756	    }
757	
758	    /**
759	     * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
760	     * 
761	     * @param partCategoryCode 部件类别
762	     * @param constraintReqs   约束请求字符串数组
763	     * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
764	     */
765	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommend(String partCategoryCode, String... constraintReqs) {
766	        List<PartConstraintReq> partConstraintReqs = toPartConstraintReqs(partCategoryCode, constraintReqs);
767	
768	        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
769	        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
770	        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
771	        req.setPartCategoryCode(partCategoryCode);
772	        req.setPartConstraintReqs(partConstraintReqs);
773	
774	        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
775	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
776	        long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
777	        long executionTime = endTime - startTime;
778	        log.info("Inference recommend execution time: {} ms", executionTime);
779	        setResult(result);
780	        setSolutions(result.getData());
781	        return getSolutions();
782	    }

788	    /**
789	     * 比较Solution的值
790	     *
791	     * @param index
792	     * @param expect
793	     */
794	    public void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect) {
795	        assertSoluContain(index, expect, true);
796	    }
797	
798	    private void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect, boolean isSimple) {
799	        String msg = "Solution at index " + index + " should match expected string";
800	        assertTrue(solutions.size() >= index, msg);
801	        assertStringContains(solutions.get(index - 1).toShortString(isSimple),
802	                expect,
803	                msg);
804	    }
805	
806	    private void assertStringContains(String real, String expect, String msg) {
807	        // boolean result = real.contains(expect);
808	        boolean result = contains(real, expect);
809	        if (!result) {
810	            assertEquals(expect, real, "contains is false," + msg);
811	        }
812	    }
813	
814	    protected void assertSoluContain(String expect) {
815	        assertSoluContain(expect, true);
816	    }
817	
818	    private void assertSoluContain(String expect, boolean isSimple) {
819	        boolean isContain = false;
820	        for (ModuleInst solu : result.getData()) {
821	            if (contains(solu.toShortString(isSimple), expect)) {
822	                isContain = true;
823	                break;
824	            }
825	        }
826	        assertTrue(isContain,
827	                "Solution contain " + expect);
828	    }
829	
830	    private boolean contains(String realWholeStr, String expectStr) {
831	        List<String> expectParts = parseExpect(expectStr);
832	        for (String expectPart : expectParts) {
833	            if (!realWholeStr.contains(expectPart)) {
834	                return false;
835	            }
836	        }
837	        return true;
838	    }
839	
840	    private List<String> parseExpect(String expectStr) {
841	        // expectStr = "cpu2(Q:20,H:0,S:1),md1(Q:5,H:0,S:1),sd1(0*)"
842	        // 预期结果：["cpu2(Q:20,H:0,S:1)","md1(Q:5,H:0,S:1)","sd1(0*)"
843	        // 处理逻辑： 根据“),”来拆分
844	        List<String> result = new ArrayList<>();
845	        String[] items = expectStr.split("\\),");
846	        for (String item : items) {
847	            result.add(item.trim());
848	        }
849	        return result;
850	    }
851	
852	}
```
</details></tool-use>

1	package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;
2	
3	import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
4	
5	import lombok.Data;
6	
7	import java.util.ArrayList;
8	import java.util.Collections;
9	import java.util.HashMap;
10	import java.util.List;
11	import java.util.Map;
12	
13	/**
14	 * 模块基础实例类
15	 * ModuleInst和PartCategoryInst的公共基类
16	 * 提供实例的公共属性和方法
17	 *
18	 * @since 2025-01-XX
19	 */
20	@Data
21	public class ModuleBaseInst {
22	
23	    /**
24	     * 默认实例ID常量
25	     */
26	    public static final int DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID = 0;
27	
28	    /**
29	     * 无序的实例ID常量
30	     */
31	    public static final int INVALID_INSTANCE_ID = -1;
32	
33	    /**
34	     * 其他变量值键名
35	     * 用于存储其他变量的值映射，格式：v1:1,v2:2,v3:3,v4:1
36	     */
37	    public static final String OTHER_VARIABLES_VALUE_KEY = "OTHER_VARIABLES_VALUE";
38	
39	    /**
40	     * 其他变量备注键名
41	     * 用于存储其他变量的备注信息，格式：v1:a1OrA3, v2:b1OrB2OrB3
42	     */
43	    public static final String OTHER_VARIABLES_MEMO_KEY = "OTHER_VARIABLES_MEMO";
44	
45	    /**
46	     * 实例ID，默认为0，多个实例从0开始，如：0，1,2，....
47	     */
48	    private int instanceId = DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;
49	
50	    /**
51	     * 编码
52	     */
53	    private String code;
54	
55	    /**
56	     * 参数实例列表
57	     */
58	    private List<ParaInst> paras = new ArrayList<>();
59	
60	    /**
61	     * 部件实例列表（仅当前层的部件）
62	     */
63	    private List<PartInst> parts = new ArrayList<>();
64	
65	    /**
66	     * 扩展属性
67	     */
68	    private Map<String, Object> extAttrs = new HashMap<>();
69	
70	    /**
71	     * 短编码,仅用于调试
72	     */
73	    @JsonIgnore
74	    private String shortCode;
75	
76	    /**
77	     * 根据部件代码查询部件实例
78	     *
79	     * @param partCode 部件代码
80	     * @return 部件实例，如果不存在则返回null
81	     */
82	    public PartInst queryPart(String partCode) {
83	        if (partCode == null || partCode.isEmpty()) {
84	            return null;
85	        }
86	        for (PartInst partInst : parts) {
87	            if (partCode.equals(partInst.getCode())) {
88	                return partInst;
89	            }
90	        }
91	        return null;
92	    }
93	
94	    /**
95	     * 添加参数实例
96	     *
97	     * @param paraInst 参数实例
98	     */
99	    public void addParaInst(ParaInst paraInst) {
100	        paras.add(paraInst);
101	    }
102	
103	    /**
104	     * 添加部件实例
105	     *
106	     * @param partInst 部件实例
107	     */
108	    public void addPartInst(PartInst partInst) {
109	        parts.add(partInst);
110	    }
111	
112	    /**
113	     * 生成短字符串表示
114	     *
115	     * @param isSimple 是否使用简单格式
116	     * @return 短字符串
117	     */
118	    public String toShortString(boolean isSimple, int instId) {
119	        String prefix = instId > 0 ? "I" + instId + "_" : "";
120	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
121	        // 对paras按code升序排序
122	        Collections.sort(paras, (a, b) -> a.getCode().compareTo(b.getCode()));
123	        // 对parts按code升序排序
124	        Collections.sort(parts, (a, b) -> a.getCode().compareTo(b.getCode()));
125	        // 添加参数信息
126	        for (ParaInst para : paras) {
127	            if (sb.length() > 0) {
128	                sb.append(",");
129	            }
130	            sb.append(prefix).append(para.toShortString());
131	        }
132	
133	        // 添加部件信息
134	        for (PartInst part : parts) {
135	            if (sb.length() > 0) {
136	                sb.append(",");
137	            }
138	            sb.append(prefix).append(part.toShortString(isSimple));
139	        }
140	        // 添加其他变量信息
141	        appendOtherVariablesInfo(sb);
142	
143	        // 如果有shortCode，则使用shortCode作为前缀
144	        if (shortCode != null) {
145	            return shortCode + "(" + sb.toString() + ")";
146	        }
147	
148	        return sb.toString();
149	    }
150	
151	    /**
152	     * 添加其他变量信息到字符串构建器
153	     *
154	     * @param sb 字符串构建器
155	     */
156	    protected void appendOtherVariablesInfo(StringBuilder sb) {
157	        Object otherVarsValue = extAttrs.get(OTHER_VARIABLES_VALUE_KEY);
158	        if (!(otherVarsValue instanceof Map)) {
159	            return;
160	        }
161	        @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
162	        Map<String, Long> otherVarKeyMap = (Map<String, Long>) otherVarsValue;
163	        if (otherVarKeyMap.isEmpty()) {
164	            return;
165	        }
166	        if (sb.length() > 0) {
167	            sb.append(",");
168	        }
169	        sb.append("Other(");
170	        boolean first = true;
171	        for (Map.Entry<String, Long> entry : otherVarKeyMap.entrySet()) {
172	            if (!first) {
173	                sb.append(",");
174	            }
175	            sb.append(entry.getKey()).append(":").append(entry.getValue());
176	            first = false;
177	        }
178	        sb.append(")");
179	    }
180	}
181

47	    /**
48	     * 决策策略列表
49	     * 用于指定该部件分类的变量分支顺序
50	     */
51	    private List<StrategyConfig> decisionStrategies;
52	
53	    /**
54	     * 生成短字符串表示
55	     * 格式：partCategoryCode:attrCode attrComparator attrValue where
56	     * attrWhereCondition
57	     * 示例："drive:Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed like %5400%"
58	     * 
59	     * @return 短字符串表示
60	     */
61	    public String toShortString() {
62	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
63	
64	        // 添加部件分类代码
65	        if (partCategoryCode != null && !partCategoryCode.isEmpty()) {
66	            sb.append(partCategoryCode).append(":");
67	        }
68	
69	        // 添加属性代码、比较符和值
70	        if (attrCode != null && !attrCode.isEmpty()) {
71	            sb.append(attrCode);
72	            if (attrComparator != null && !attrComparator.isEmpty() && attrValue != null && !attrValue.isEmpty()) {
73	                sb.append(" ").append(attrComparator);
74	                // 比较符和值之间不加空格，例如 ">=5" 而不是 ">= 5"
75	                sb.append(attrValue);
76	            }
77	        }
78	
79	        // 添加 where 条件
80	        if (attrWhereCondition != null && !attrWhereCondition.isEmpty()) {
81	            sb.append(" where ").append(attrWhereCondition);
82	        }
83	
84	        return sb.toString();
85	    }
86	}
87
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./\doc\RFC-0002-PartCategory-Filter-Empty-Handling.md`

```text
1	# RFC-0002: 部件分类过滤为空时的输出处理
2	
3	> 状态：草案（Draft）
4	> 日期：2026-04-30
5	
6	---
7	
8	## 1. 摘要
9	
10	本RFC提议：当某个 PartCategory 根据输入的过滤条件找不到匹配部件时，不应导致整体求解失败，而应在**输出端**（PartCategoryInst）上携带错误信息，同时继续输出其他满足条件的部件分类的有效解。
11	
12	---
13	
14	## 2. 动机
15	
16	### 2.1 问题背景
17	
18	当前处理流程分为两步：
19	
20	1. 根据 `PartConstraintReq` 中的过滤条件（`attrWhereCondition`）对 PartCategory 进行过滤
21	2. 基于过滤后的部件构建约束表达式并求解
22	
23	**存在的问题**：如果第1步过滤后没有匹配的部件，第2步构建约束表达式时：
24	
25	- 如果该部件分类与其他部件分类存在关联规则（如 `inCompatible`、`sumFunConstraint`），会导致整体求解失败
26	- 即使其他部件分类（如 CPU）能正常求解，用户也**得不到任何有效信息**——既不返回部分有效解，也不提示是哪个分类的哪个过滤条件导致了问题
27	
28	### 2.2 问题场景
29	
30	用户输入两个部件约束请求：
31	
32	```
33	drive: Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400   ← Speed=5400 能找到匹配部件 ✓
34	cpu:   Sum_Memory >=512 where CoreNum=4    ← CoreNum=4 找不到任何匹配部件 ✗
35	```
36	
37	**当前行为**：`ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone()` 在 cpu 分类过滤为空时抛出 `AlgExecutorException`（行 194-198），整体返回 `Result.failed`。两个分类的结果都丢失了。
38	
39	**期望行为**：
40	- drive 分类正常求解，返回有效解
41	- cpu 分类对应的 Instance 上输出错误信息，包含 ErrorCode 和 ErrorMessage
42	- 用户可以同时看到成功的配置结果和失败的原因
43	
44	### 2.3 多实例场景
45	
46	多实例场景下，同一个 PartCategory 的不同实例可能有不同的过滤条件：
47	
48	```
49	driveI0: where Speed=5400   ← 能找到匹配部件 ✓
50	driveI1: where Speed=3000   ← 找不到匹配部件 ✗
51	```
52	
53	期望每个 Instance 独立报告自己的错误状态。
54	
55	---
56	
57	## 3. 设计方案
58	
59	### 3.1 核心思路
60	
61	**输入不变，只改输出**。PartConstraintReq 无需任何修改。改动集中在：
62	
63	1. `filterClone`：过滤为空时不再抛异常，改为创建一个"空"的 PartCategoryInput（filteredCategory 的 atomicParts 为空），正常纳入后续流程
64	2. `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()`：识别 PartCategoryInput 中 filteredCategory 无部件的情况，跳过约束构建，记录错误
65	3. **输出端**：`PartCategoryInst` 新增 error 字段，求解完成后将错误信息写入
66	
67	### 3.2 输出模型扩展
68	
69	#### 3.2.1 错误码常量
70	
71	```java
72	package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;
73	
74	/**
75	 * PartCategory 实例错误码常量
76	 */
77	public final class InstErrorCode {
78	    private InstErrorCode() {}
79	
80	    /** 无错误 */
81	    public static final int NO_ERROR = 0;
82	
83	    /** 过滤条件未匹配到任何部件 */
84	    public static final int FILTER_EMPTY = 1;
85	}
86	```
87	
88	#### 3.2.2 PartCategoryInst 增加 error 字段
89	
90	```java
91	public class PartCategoryInst extends ModuleBaseInst {
92	    // ... 现有字段 ...
93	
94	    /**
95	     * 错误码，0 表示无错误
96	     */
97	    private int errorCode = InstErrorCode.NO_ERROR;
98	
99	    /**
100	     * 错误消息，包含详细的上下文信息方便定位
101	     * 示例: "No parts found for condition: CoreNum=8 in category cpu"
102	     */
103	    private String errorMessage;
104	}
105	```
106	
107	#### 3.2.3 Result 增加 PARTIAL_SUCCESS
108	
109	```java
110	public class Result<T> {
111	    public static final int SUCCESS = 0;
112	    public static final int FAILED = 1;
113	    public static final int NO_SOLUTION = 2;
114	    /** 部分成功：至少一个分类正常返回解，但存在分类过滤为空 */
115	    public static final int PARTIAL_SUCCESS = 3;
116	}
117	```
118	
119	### 3.3 处理流程改造
120	
121	```
122	filterClone(startModule, partConstraintReqMap)
123	        │
124	        ▼
125	┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
126	│  遍历每个 PartCategory                                    │
127	│    ├── 过滤有匹配部件 → 正常创建 PartCategoryInput         │
128	│    └── 过滤为空        → 创建 PartCategoryInput              │
129	│                          (filteredCategory 无 atomicParts)│
130	│                          + 收集错误信息到 errorInfoMap     │
131	└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
132	        │
133	        ▼
134	┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
135	│  ModuleAlgImpl.initData()                                 │
136	│    ├── filteredCategory 有部件 → 正常创建 AlgImpl          │
137	│    └── filteredCategory 无部件 → 跳过 AlgImpl 创建         │
138	│                                  记录到 emptyCategoryCodes │
139	└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
140	        │
141	        ▼
142	┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
143	│  求解（只针对有效分类）                                     │
144	└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
145	        │
146	        ▼
147	┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
148	│  结果组装                                                  │
149	│    遍历 solutions，为每个 ModuleInst 的 PartCategoryInst   │
150	│    设置 errorCode 和 errorMessage                         │
151	└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
152	```
153	
154	### 3.4 关键代码改造
155	
156	#### 3.4.1 filterClone 不再抛异常
157	
158	```java
159	// 当前 (ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java:194-198)
160	if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
161	    throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
162	}
163	
164	// 改造后
165	if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
166	    log.warn("Filter empty for category {}: {}", partCategoryCode, msg);
167	    errorInfoMap.put(partCategoryCode,
168	        new ErrorInfo(InstErrorCode.FILTER_EMPTY,
169	            "No parts found for condition: " + req.getAttrWhereCondition()));
170	    // 仍然创建 PartCategoryInput，但 filteredCategory 为空的克隆
171	    // 确保后续流程能识别并跳过
172	}
173	```
174	
175	#### 3.4.2 ModuleAlgImpl.initData() 跳过空分类
176	
177	```java
178	for (PartCategory partCategory : bModule.getPartCategorys()) {
179	    String categoryCode = partCategory.getCode();
180	    PartCategoryInputBase input = partConstraintFromReqMap.get(categoryCode);
181	
182	    if (input != null && input.getFilteredCategory() != null
183	            && input.getFilteredCategory().getAtomicParts().isEmpty()) {
184	        // 过滤为空，跳过约束构建
185	        emptyCategoryCodes.add(categoryCode);
186	        continue;
187	    }
188	
189	    // ... 正常创建 AlgImpl ...
190	}
191	```
192	
193	#### 3.4.3 结果组装时写入错误
194	
195	```java
196	// 求解完成后
197	for (ModuleInst solution : solutions) {
198	    for (PartCategoryInst pcInst : solution.getPartCategoryInsts()) {
199	        ErrorInfo errorInfo = errorInfoMap.get(pcInst.getCode());
200	        if (errorInfo != null) {
201	            pcInst.setErrorCode(errorInfo.errorCode);
202	            pcInst.setErrorMessage(errorInfo.errorMessage);
203	        }
204	    }
205	}
206	```
207	
208	### 3.5 多实例场景
209	
210	多实例场景下，每个实例独立判断：
211	
212	```
213	driveI0: filter Speed=5400  → 找到部件 → 正常求解
214	driveI1: filter Speed=3000  → 找不到部件 → errorCode=1
215	```
216	
217	每个 `PartCategoryInst` 有独立的 `errorCode` 和 `errorMessage`。
218	
219	---
220	
221	## 4. 验收准则
222	
223	### 4.1 功能验收用例
224	
225	#### ERR-001：单个分类过滤为空
226	
227	**目的**：验证单个 PartCategory 过滤为空时，不阻断整体求解，错误信息写入输出。
228	
229	**测试数据（极简）**：
230	```java
231	@PartAnno(code = "cpu")
232	@DAttrAnno1(code = "CoreNum", options = {"CoreNum_4:4", "CoreNum_8:8"})
233	private PartCategoryVar cpu;
234	
235	@PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"4"}, price = 100)
236	private PartVar cpu4;
237	
238	@PartAnno(code = "drive")
239	@DAttrAnno1(code = "Speed", options = {"Speed_5400:5400"})
240	private PartCategoryVar drive;
241	
242	@PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"5400"}, price = 50)
243	private PartVar drive1;
244	```
245	
246	**测试用例**：
247	
248	| ID | 过滤条件 | 预期行为 |
249	|----|----------|----------|
250	| ERR-001-1 | cpu: where CoreNum=8, drive: where Speed=5400 | cpu 过滤为空，drive 正常 |
251	| ERR-001-2 | cpu: where CoreNum=4, drive: where Speed=7200 | drive 过滤为空，cpu 正常 |
252	| ERR-001-3 | cpu: where CoreNum=4, drive: where Speed=5400 | 两个都匹配，无错误 |
253	
254	**验证逻辑**：
255	
256	新增断言方法：
257	
258	```java
259	// 独立检查某个分类的错误码
260	// expect 格式: "cpu:FILTER_EMPTY" → categoryCode:errorCodeName
261	protected void assertSoluErrorContain(int soluIndex, String expect) { ... }
262	
263	// 增强: 解字符串中直接携带错误码
264	// 格式: "drive1(Q:1,H:0,S:1),cpu:FILTER_EMPTY"
265	// 逗号分隔，后半段为分类级错误码
266	```
267	
268	```java
269	// ERR-001-1: cpu 过滤为空，drive 正常
270	@Test
271	public void testErr001_CpuFilterEmpty_DriveOk() {
272	    inferRecommendModule(
273	        "cpu: where CoreNum=8",
274	        "drive: where Speed=5400");
275	    printSolutions();
276	
277	    resultAssert().assertCode(Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS);
278	    // 一行断言: drive1选中 + cpu报FILTER_EMPTY
279	    assertSoluContain(1, "drive1(Q:1,H:0,S:1),cpu:FILTER_EMPTY");
280	}
281	
282	// ERR-001-2: drive 过滤为空，cpu 正常
283	@Test
284	public void testErr001_CpuOk_DriveFilterEmpty() {
285	    inferRecommendModule(
286	        "cpu: where CoreNum=4",
287	        "drive: where Speed=7200");
288	    printSolutions();
289	
290	    resultAssert().assertCode(Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS);
291	    assertSoluContain(1, "cpu4(Q:1,H:0,S:1),drive:FILTER_EMPTY");
292	}
293	
294	// ERR-001-3: 两个都正常
295	@Test
296	public void testErr001_BothOk() {
297	    inferRecommendModule(
298	        "cpu: where CoreNum=4",
299	        "drive: where Speed=5400");
300	    printSolutions();
301	
302	    resultAssert().assertCode(Result.SUCCESS);
303	    assertSoluContain(1, "cpu4(Q:1,H:0,S:1),drive1(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
304	}
305	```
306	
307	#### ERR-002：两个分类都过滤为空
308	
309	| ID | 过滤条件 | 预期行为 |
310	|----|----------|----------|
311	| ERR-002-1 | cpu: where CoreNum=8, drive: where Speed=7200 | 两个都为空，无有效分类 |
312	
313	```java
314	@Test
315	public void testErr002_BothFilterEmpty() {
316	    inferRecommendModule(
317	        "cpu: where CoreNum=8",
318	        "drive: where Speed=7200");
319	    printSolutions();
320	
321	    resultAssert().assertCode(Result.NO_SOLUTION);
322	    // 也可只检查错误
323	    assertSoluErrorContain(1, "cpu:FILTER_EMPTY");
324	    assertSoluErrorContain(1, "drive:FILTER_EMPTY");
325	}
326	```
327	
328	#### ERR-003：多实例部分过滤为空
329	
330	**目的**：验证多实例场景下，每个实例独立报告错误。
331	
332	**测试数据（极简）**：
333	```java
334	@PartAnno(code = "drive", instCodes = "driveI0,driveI1", supportMultiInst = true)
335	@DAttrAnno1(code = "Speed", options = {"Speed_5400:5400", "Speed_7200:7200"})
336	private PartCategoryVar drive;
337	
338	@PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"5400"}, price = 50)
339	private PartVar drive1;
340	
341	@PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"7200"}, price = 80)
342	private PartVar drive2;
343	```
344	
345	| ID | 过滤条件 | 预期行为 |
346	|----|----------|----------|
347	| ERR-003-1 | driveI0: where Speed=5400, driveI1: where Speed=3000 | driveI0 正常，driveI1 过滤为空 |
348	| ERR-003-2 | driveI0: where Speed=5400, driveI1: where Speed=7200 | 两个都正常 |
349	
350	**验证逻辑**：
351	
352	```java
353	// ERR-003-1: 多实例，第1个实例正常，第2个实例过滤为空
354	@Test
355	public void testErr003_MultiInst_PartialEmpty() {
356	    inferRecommendModule(
357	        "driveI0: where Speed=5400",
358	        "driveI1: where Speed=3000");
359	    printSolutions();
360	
361	    resultAssert().assertCode(Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS);
362	    assertSoluContain(1, "drive1(Q:1,H:0,S:1),driveI1:FILTER_EMPTY");
363	}
364	
365	// ERR-003-2: 多实例，两个都正常
366	@Test
367	public void testErr003_MultiInst_BothOk() {
368	    inferRecommendModule(
369	        "driveI0: where Speed=5400",
370	        "driveI1: where Speed=7200");
371	    printSolutions();
372	
373	    resultAssert().assertCode(Result.SUCCESS);
374	    assertSoluContain(1, "drive1(Q:1,H:0,S:1),drive2(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
375	}
376	```
377	
378	---
379	
380	### 4.2 边界条件
381	
382	| 条件 | 输入 | 预期行为 |
383	|------|------|----------|
384	| 分类代码不存在 | `nonexist: where X=Y` | 忽略，不产生错误 |
385	| 无过滤条件（全匹配） | `cpu:` | 返回所有部件，errorCode=0 |
386	| 部分分类无请求 | 有 cpu/drive 两个分类，只请求 cpu | drive 正常处理（无过滤，全量），不产生错误 |
387	
388	### 4.3 回归测试
389	
390	- 现有所有测试用例的 result.code 不变（不会出现意外的 PARTIAL_SUCCESS）
391	- `SolutionUtils.printSolutions()` 输出中增加 errorCode/errorMessage 的展示
392	
393	---
394	
395	## 5. 实现计划
396	
397	| 阶段 | 任务 | 优先级 |
398	|------|------|--------|
399	| 1 | `InstErrorCode` 常量类 | P0 |
400	| 2 | `PartCategoryInst` 增加 `errorCode` + `errorMessage` | P0 |
401	| 3 | `Result` 增加 `PARTIAL_SUCCESS = 3` | P0 |
402	| 4 | 改造 `filterClone` — 不抛异常，收集空分类信息 | P0 |
403	| 5 | 改造 `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` — 跳过空分类 | P0 |
404	| 6 | 结果组装阶段写入错误信息到 PartCategoryInst | P0 |
405	| 7 | `SolutionUtils.printSolutions()` 展示错误信息 | P1 |
406	| 8 | 编写测试 ERR-001 ~ ERR-003 | P1 |
407	| 9 | 回归测试 | P1 |
408	
409	---
410

```text
1	package com.jmix.executor.impl;
2	
3	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
4	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
5	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
6	import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
7	import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.SolverResult;
8	import com.jmix.executor.model.InferPartCategoryReq;
9	import com.jmix.executor.model.PartConstraintReq;
10	import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
11	
12	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
13	
14	import java.util.ArrayList;
15	import java.util.HashMap;
16	import java.util.HashSet;
17	import java.util.List;
18	import java.util.Map;
19	import java.util.Set;
20	
21	/**
22	 * 部件分类约束执行器实现类
23	 * 专门处理部件分类相关的约束求解
24	 *
25	 * @since 2025-01-XX
26	 */
27	@Slf4j
28	public class PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {
29	
30	    public PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl() {
31	    }
32	
33	    /**
34	     * 处理部件分类约束
35	     *
36	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
37	     * @return 推理结果
38	     */
39	    @Override
40	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
41	        try {
42	            // 查找原始部件分类
43	            PartCategory originalCategory = module.getPartCategory(partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
44	            if (originalCategory == null) {
45	                log.error("PartCategory not found: {}", partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
46	                return Result.failed("PartCategory not found: " + partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
47	            }
48	            log.info("Priority-orginal aparts: {}", originalCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString());
49	            // 遍历所有部件约束请求，逐步过滤
50	            PartCategory filteredCategory = originalCategory;
51	            List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
52	            for (PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq : partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs()) {
53	                // 一条partConstraintReq会被拆分两条规则，一条是过滤规则（根据where条件过滤），一条是约束规则（根据attrCode,
54	                // attrComparator, attrValue构建约束表达式）
55	                // 查询满足条件的PartCategory
56	                filteredCategory = filteredCategory.filterClone(partConstraintReq);
57	                String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
58	                        filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
59	                        partConstraintReq.toShortString());
60	                log.info(msg);
61	                if (filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
62	                    return Result.noSolution(msg);
63	                }
64	                PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.toPartCategoryInput(
65	                        filteredCategory, partConstraintReq);
66	                partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
67	            }
68	            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
69	            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(partCategoryInputs);
70	
71	            SolverResult sr = null;
72	            // 检查是否有优先级规则，如果有则使用分级求解
73	            Module moduleClone = module.clone();
74	
75	            if (filteredCategory.hasPriorityRule()) {
76	                PartCategory mergedFilteredCategory = buildMergedFilteredCategory(originalCategory,
77	                        partCategoryInputs);
78	                moduleClone.addPartCategory(mergedFilteredCategory);
79	                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(
80	                        moduleClone, moduleInput);
81	            } else {
82	                moduleClone.addPartCategory(filteredCategory);
83	                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(moduleClone, moduleInput);
84	            }
85	            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());
86	
87	        } catch (Exception e) {
88	            log.error("Failed to process part category constraint", e);
89	            return Result.failed("Failed to process part category constraint: " + e.getMessage());
90	        }
91	    }
92	
93	    /**
94	     * 将部件列表添加到合并的原子部件Map中
95	     *
96	     * @param mergedAtomicParts 合并的原子部件Map
97	     * @param parts             部件列表
98	     */
99	    private void addPartsToMap(Map<String, Part> mergedAtomicParts, List<Part> parts) {
100	        for (Part part : parts) {
101	            mergedAtomicParts.put(part.getCode(), part);
102	        }
103	    }
104	
105	    /**
106	     * 构建合并后的过滤分类
107	     * 仅支持两层结果，不构建结构
108	     * 使用扣除法原则：
109	     * - 含有父分类，则求并集
110	     * - 不含有父分类，补充没有在里面的子分类的部件
111	     *
112	     * @param originalCategory   原始部件分类
113	     * @param partCategoryInputs 部件约束列表
114	     * @return 合并后的过滤分类
115	     */
116	    private PartCategory buildMergedFilteredCategory(PartCategory originalCategory,
117	            List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs) {
118	        // 实现案例
119	        // --drive PC
120	        // ----sd PC
121	        // -------sd1 part
122	        // -------sd2 part
123	        // -------sd3 part
124	        // ----md PC
125	        // -------md1 part
126	        // -------md2 part
127	        // -------md3 part
128	
129	        // 含有父，则求并集
130	        // input1: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{drive-> md1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2,md1}
131	        // input1: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{drive-> sd1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2}
132	        // 不还原其层次结构
133	
134	        // 不含有父，补充没有在里面的子分类的部件
135	        // input1: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{md->md1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2,md1} // 各个孩子都有
136	        // *input2: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{sd->sd1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2,md1,md2,md3} 补充
137	
138	        Map<String, Part> mergedAtomicParts = new HashMap<>();
139	        Set<String> allPartCategoryCodes = new HashSet<>();
140	
141	        // 收集所有约束请求的分类代码和原子部件
142	        for (PartCategoryInputBase ipt : partCategoryInputs) {
143	            if (!(ipt instanceof PartCategoryInput)) {
144	                log.warn("ipt is not PartCategoryInput, code: " + ipt.getPartCategoryCode());
145	                continue;
146	            }
147	            PartCategoryInput partConstraint = (PartCategoryInput) ipt;
148	            String categoryCode = partConstraint.getOrgReq().getPartCategoryCode();
149	            allPartCategoryCodes.add(categoryCode);
150	            // 合并原子部件
151	            List<Part> atomicParts = partConstraint.getFilteredCategory().getAllAtomicParts();
152	            addPartsToMap(mergedAtomicParts, atomicParts);
153	        }
154	
155	        // 判断父分类是否包含在allPartCategoryCodes中
156	        if (!allPartCategoryCodes.contains(originalCategory.getCode())) {
157	            // 要把没有包含的子分类的部件补充上
158	            List<PartCategory> partCategoryList = originalCategory.getPartCategorys();
159	            for (PartCategory subPartCategory : partCategoryList) {
160	                if (!allPartCategoryCodes.contains(subPartCategory.getCode())) {
161	                    // 补充未包含的子分类的所有原子部件
162	                    List<Part> subAtomicParts = subPartCategory.getAllAtomicParts();
163	                    addPartsToMap(mergedAtomicParts, subAtomicParts);
164	                }
165	            }
166	        }
167	        // 克隆原始分类并添加合并的部件
168	        PartCategory resultCategory = originalCategory.clone();
169	        resultCategory.addAtomicPartsWithoutStructure(new ArrayList<>(mergedAtomicParts.values()));
170	        return resultCategory;
171	    }
172	
173	}
174
```
</details></tool-use>

74	    @JsonIgnore
75	    public List<PartInst> getAllParts() {
76	        List<PartInst> allParts = new ArrayList<>();
77	        // 添加当前层的部件
78	        allParts.addAll(getParts());
79	        // 递归添加所有子PartCategoryInst的部件
80	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
81	            allParts.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllParts());
82	        }
83	        return allParts;
84	    }
85	
86	    /**
87	     * 获取所有部件分类实例
88	     *
89	     * @return 所有部件分类实例列表
90	     */
91	    @JsonIgnore
92	    public List<PartCategoryInst> getAllPartCategorys() {
93	        List<PartCategoryInst> allPartCategorys = new ArrayList<>();
94	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
95	            allPartCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
96	            allPartCategorys.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllPartCategorys());
97	        }
98	        return allPartCategorys;
99	    }
100	
101	    /**
102	     * 添加部件分类实例
103	     *
104	     * @param partCategoryInst 部件分类实例
105	     */
106	    public void addPartCategoryInst(PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst) {
107	        partCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
108	    }
109	
110	    /**
111	     * 根据部件代码查询部件实例（从所有部件中查询）
112	     *
113	     * @param partCode 部件代码
114	     * @return 部件实例，如果不存在则返回null
115	     */
116	    @JsonIgnore
117	    public PartInst queryPart(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String partCode) {
118	        // 先在当前层查找
119	        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(partCategoryCode)) {
120	            return super.queryPart(partCode);
121	        }
122	        // 在当前层查找
123	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
124	            if (partCategoryInst.getCode().equals(partCategoryCode) && partCategoryInst.getInstanceId() == instId) {
125	                return partCategoryInst.queryPart(partCode);
126	            }
127	        }
128	        return null;
129	    }
130	
131	    /**
132	     * 添加优先级属性值信息到字符串构建器
133	     * 格式：PAs(CA:100,TA:200,....)，attrCode取前两位的大写字符
134	     *
135	     * @param sb 字符串构建器
136	     */
137	    public void appendPriorityAttrValuesInfo(StringBuilder sb) {
138	        sb.append(" PO:").append(priorityOverallValue);
139	        sb.append(" PS:").append(prioritySortNo);
140	        if (priorityAttrValues == null || priorityAttrValues.isEmpty()) {
141	            return;
142	        }
143	        if (sb.length() > 0) {
144	            sb.append(",");
145	        }
146	        sb.append("PAs(");
147	        boolean first = true;
148	        for (PriorityAttrValue priorityAttrValue : priorityAttrValues) {
149	            if (!first) {
150	                sb.append(",");
151	            }
152	            String shortCode = toAttrShortCode(priorityAttrValue.getAttrCode());
153	            sb.append(shortCode).append(":").append(priorityAttrValue.getOptimalValue());
154	            first = false;
155	        }
156	        sb.append(")");
157	    }
158	
159	    /**
160	     * 获取优先级属性短编码字符串
161	     * 输出 attrCode 和 shortCode 的关系
162	     *
163	     * @return 优先级属性短编码字符串，格式：shortCode:attrCode，多个用逗号分隔
164	     */
165	    @JsonIgnore
166	    public String getPriorityAttrShortCodeStr() {
167	        if (priorityAttrValues == null || priorityAttrValues.isEmpty()) {
168	            return "";
169	        }
170	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
171	        sb.append("PAs:priorityAttrValues ").append("PO:priorityOverallValue ")
172	                .append("PS:prioritySortNo");
173	        sb.append(" (");
174	        boolean first = true;
175	        for (PriorityAttrValue priorityAttrValue : priorityAttrValues) {
176	            String attrCode = priorityAttrValue.getAttrCode();
177	            if (attrCode == null || attrCode.isEmpty()) {
178	                continue;
179	            }
180	            if (!first) {
181	                sb.append(",");
182	            }
183	            String shortCode = toAttrShortCode(attrCode);
184	            sb.append(shortCode).append(":").append(attrCode);
185	            first = false;
186	        }
187	        sb.append(")");
188	        return sb.toString();
189	    }
190	
191	    /**
192	     * 将属性代码转换为短编码
193	     * 取 attrCode 的前两位，转换为大写
194	     *
195	     * @param attrCode 属性代码
196	     * @return 短编码，如果 attrCode 为 null 或长度不足则返回空字符串
197	     */
198	    private String toAttrShortCode(String attrCode) {
199	        if (attrCode == null) {
200	            return "";
201	        }
202	        if (attrCode.length() >= 2) {
203	            return attrCode.substring(0, 2).toUpperCase();
204	        }
205	        return attrCode.toUpperCase();
206	    }
207	
208	    /**
209	     * 生成短字符串表示（包含优先级信息）
210	     *
211	     * @param isSimple 是否使用简单格式
212	     * @return 短字符串
213	     */
214	    public String toShortString(boolean isSimple) {
215	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
216	        // 当前模块本身的
217	        sb.append(super.toShortString(isSimple, 0));
218	        toShortString(sb, isSimple, this.getPartCategorys());
219	        // 添加优先级属性值信息
220	        appendPriorityAttrValuesInfo(sb);
221	        return sb.toString();
222	    }
223	
224	    private void toShortString(StringBuilder sb, boolean isSimple, List<PartCategoryInst> pCategoryInsts) {
225	        // 分类的
226	        int index = 0;
227	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategory : this.partCategorys) {
228	            index++;
229	            sb.append(partCategory.toShortString(isSimple, partCategory.getInstanceId()));
230	            if (!(index == this.partCategorys.size())) { // isLast
231	                sb.append(",");
232	            }
233	        }
234	    }
235	}

26	/**
27	 * 模块基础约束执行器抽象类
28	 * 提供模块约束执行的公共功能
29	 *
30	 * @since 2025-01-XX
31	 */
32	@Slf4j
33	public abstract class ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {
34	
35	    protected Module module;
36	
37	    protected ConstraintConfig config;
38	
39	    protected ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader;
40	
41	    public void init(Module module, ConstraintConfig config,
42	            ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader) {
43	        this.module = module;
44	        this.config = config;
45	        this.moduleAlgClassLoader = moduleAlgClassLoader;
46	    }
47	
48	    /**
49	     * 执行约束处理的主方法，由子类实现
50	     *
51	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
52	     * @return 处理结果
53	     */
54	    public abstract Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq);
55	
56	    /**
57	     * 求解约束模型并返回结果（无优先级约束）
58	     *
59	     * @param filteredModuleBase 过滤后的模块基础
60	     * @param partCategoryReq    部件分类请求
61	     * @return 求解结果
62	     */
63	    protected SolverResult solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
64	        log.info("no Priority-process starting........");
65	        return invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
66	    }
67	
68	    /**
69	     * 主求解方法-带优先级约束
70	     */
71	    protected SolverResult solveWithPriorityConstraints(
72	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
73	        log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step1 max/min starting........");
74	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解 minimize(objecFun)
75	        SolverResult result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
76	
77	        if (!result.hasSolution()) {
78	            result.setMessage("Cannot find solution in first step");
79	            return result;
80	        }
81	
82	        // 步骤2：在保持高优先级目标接近最优的前提下，寻找多个解，objecFun <=
83	        // ajustObjectValue(不断调整ajustObjectValue)
84	        final int maxExecTimes = 5; // 最大执行次数,
85	        final int availableSolutionNum = 5; // 可行解的格式
86	        final int minSolutionThreshold = 3; // 最少解数量阈值
87	        int execTimes = 0;
88	        double baseAdjustCoeff = 0.5; // 基础调整系数
89	        double objectValue = result.getObjectiveValue();
90	        boolean needIncreased = true; // 是否需要增加objectvalue
91	        int needIncreasedTimes = 0;
92	        do {
93	            execTimes++;
94	            SolverResult lastResult = result;
95	            // 根据上一次求解结果动态调整策略
96	            if (execTimes > 1) {
97	                if (lastResult.isHasSearchMax()) {
98	                    // objectValue设置太大，最优解都没有处理，系数需要往下调
99	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 0.7; // 降低调整幅度
100	                    needIncreased = false;
101	                    needIncreasedTimes = 0;
102	                    log.info(
103	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: objective value too high, reducing adjustment coefficient to {}",
104	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
105	                } else if (lastResult.getSolutions().size() < minSolutionThreshold) {
106	                    // 解数量太少，objectValue设置太小，系数需要往上调
107	                    needIncreasedTimes++;
108	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 3 * needIncreasedTimes;
109	                    needIncreased = true;
110	                    log.info(
111	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: too few solutions found, increasing adjustment coefficient to {}",
112	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
113	                } else {
114	                    log.info("xxxx");
115	                    break;
116	                }
117	            }
118	            // 根据上一次调整方向决定本次调整
119	            if (!needIncreased) {
120	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, -baseAdjustCoeff);
121	            } else {
122	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, baseAdjustCoeff);
123	            }
124	            log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: adjusting objective value to {}", execTimes,
125	                    objectValue);
126	            result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, objectValue);
127	
128	        } while (execTimes < maxExecTimes
129	                && result.getSolutions().size() <= availableSolutionNum);
130	        result.setIterationTimes(execTimes);
131	        return result;
132	    }
133	
134	    /**
135	     * 验证优先级总体值
136	     */
137	    protected Pair<Boolean, String> validPriorityOverallValue(double solverValue, List<ModuleInst> exprValueSolutions) {
138	        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
139	        boolean result = false;
140	
141	        if (exprValueSolutions == null || exprValueSolutions.isEmpty()) {
142	            sb.append("exprValueSolutions is empty");
143	            result = false;
144	        } else {
145	            double priorityOverallValue = exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue();
146	            if (Double.compare(priorityOverallValue, solverValue) != 0) {
147	                sb.append(String.format(
148	                        "Priority overall value mismatch: solverValue=%.2f, exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue()=%.2f",
149	                        solverValue, priorityOverallValue));
150	                result = false;
151	            } else {
152	                result = true;
153	            }
154	        }
155	
156	        return Pair.of(result, sb.toString());
157	    }
158	
159	    /**
160	     * 获取调整后的目标值
161	     */
162	    protected double getAdjustObjectValue(double objectValue, double adjustCoeff) {
163	        int cResult = Double.compare(objectValue, 0.0);
164	        if (cResult < 0) {
165	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
166	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - adjustCoeff);
167	            } else {
168	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
169	            }
170	        } else if (cResult == 0) {
171	            objectValue = adjustCoeff;
172	        } else {
173	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
174	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + adjustCoeff);
175	            } else {
176	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
177	            }
178	        }
179	        return objectValue;
180	    }
181	
182	    /**
183	     * 求解器调用入口
184	     */
185	    protected SolverResult invokerSolver(
186	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput, Double adjustOptimalValue) {
187	        log.info("invokerSolver starting........");
188	
189	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解
190	        ModuleAlgImpl optAlg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
191	        AlgCPModel optModel = new AlgCPModel();
192	        optModel.setIsAttachRelax(false);
193	        optModel.setConfictedRelaxVars(new ArrayList<>());
194	        optAlg.init(optModel, filteredModuleBase, moduleInput);
195	        // initModelByReq(moduleInput, optAlg);
196	        optAlg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
197	        boolean hasPriorityRule = optAlg.hasPriorityRule();
198	        if (hasPriorityRule) {
199	            PartAlgCPLinearExpr priorityMergedExpr = optAlg.queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr();
200	            if (adjustOptimalValue == null) {
201	                optModel.minimize(priorityMergedExpr);
202	            } else {
203	                optModel.addLessOrEqual(priorityMergedExpr, adjustOptimalValue.longValue());
204	            }
205	        }
206	
207	        // 求解最优解
208	        CpSolver optSolver = new CpSolver();
209	        optSolver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1);
210	        optSolver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(true);
211	        optSolver.getParameters().setMaxTimeInSeconds(10);
212	        if (optModel.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
213	            optSolver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
214	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies in opt solver");
215	        }
216	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack optCb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, optAlg);
217	        optCb.setMaxSolutionNum(config.getMaxSolutionNum());
218	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
219	        optModel.printModelSummary();
220	        CpSolverStatus optStatus = optSolver.solve(optModel.getCpModel(), optCb);
221	        SolverResult sr = optCb.getSolverResult();
222	        sr.setSolverStatus(optStatus.toString());
223	        if (optStatus == CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL || optStatus == CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE) {
224	            sr.setObjectiveValue(optSolver.objectiveValue());
225	            log.info("Optimal value for : {}", optSolver.objectiveValue());
226	        } else {
227	            log.error("Failed to solver, status : " + optStatus);
228	            return sr;
229	        }
230	        if (hasPriorityRule && (adjustOptimalValue == null)) {
231	            Pair<Boolean, String> validResult = validPriorityOverallValue(sr.getObjectiveValue(), sr.getSolutions());
232	            if (!validResult.getFirst()) {
233	                String msg = "Failed to valid expr&solver " + validResult.getSecond();
234	                log.error(msg);
235	            }
236	        }
237	        sortSolutionsByPriority(sr.getSolutions());
238	        log.info("solutions: \n {}",
239	                SolutionUtils.toSolutionString(sr.getSolutions()));
240	        return sr;
241	    }
242	
243	    /**
244	     * 根据优先级对解决方案进行排序
245	     */
246	    protected void sortSolutionsByPriority(List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
247	        solutions.sort((a, b) -> -Double.compare(b.getPriorityOverallValue(), a.getPriorityOverallValue()));
248	        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
249	            solutions.get(i).setPrioritySortNo(i + 1);
250	        }
251	    }

109	    public PartCategory filterClone(PartConstraintReq constraintReq) {
110	        return filterClone(this, constraintReq, false);
111	    }
112	
113	    private PartCategory filterClone(PartCategory category, PartConstraintReq constraintReq,
114	            boolean hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq) {
115	        PartCategory resultPartCategory = category.clone();
116	        if (!hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq) {
117	            if (constraintReq.getPartCategoryCode().equals(category.getCode())) {
118	                hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq = true;
119	            }
120	        }
121	        if (hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq && CollectionUtils.isEmpty(category.getPartCategorys())) {
122	            // 先匹配当前原子part
123	            List<Part> filterParts = querySubAtomicParts(category, constraintReq);
124	            resultPartCategory.addAtomicPartsWithoutStructure(filterParts);
125	        }
126	        // 在去自己的子分类中匹配
127	        for (PartCategory pc : category.getPartCategorys()) {
128	            resultPartCategory.addPart(filterClone(pc, constraintReq, hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq));
129	        }
130	        return resultPartCategory;
131	    }
132	
133	    private List<Part> querySubAtomicParts(PartCategory category, PartConstraintReq constraintReq) {
134	        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition())) {
135	            return new ArrayList<>(category.getAtomicParts());
136	        }
137	        // 解析属性代码
138	        Pair<DynamicAttribute, String> attrResult = parseAttributeFromCondition(constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition(),
139	                category.getDynAttrSchemas());
140	
141	        List<Part> filterParts = new ArrayList<>();
142	        if (attrResult.getFirst().getInstType() == 0) { // 非实例属性
143	            // 过滤条件不涉及实例属性，直接在Part级别过滤
144	            filterParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(new ArrayList<>(category.getAtomicParts()),
145	                    constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition());
146	
147	        } else { // 实例属性
148	            for (Part part : category.getAtomicParts()) {
149	                InstanceDynAttrValue instAttrs = part.getInstanceAttrs();
150	                if (instAttrs == null) {
151	                    throw new IllegalStateException("Instance attributes not found for part: " + part.getCode());
152	                }
153	                List<InstanceDynAttrValueItem> instValues = FilterExpressionExecutor
154	                        .doSelect(instAttrs.getInstsValues(), constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition());
155	                if (instValues.isEmpty()) {
156	                    continue;
157	                }
158	                Part cPart = part.clone(); // 带有实例属性，通过clone的方法，把属性的多实例值进行汇总，存储起来，方便后续调用。
159	                List<DynamicAttribute> instAttrsList = category.queryDynAttrSchemas4Inst();

16	@AllArgsConstructor
17	@NoArgsConstructor
18	public class Result<T> {

20	     * 操作成功状态码
21	     */

23	
24	    /**
25	     * 操作失败状态码

49	/**
50	 * 模块约束执行器实现类
51	 * 实现ModuleConstraintExecutor接口，提供约束求解的核心功能
52	 * 
53	 * @since 2025-09-22

55	@Slf4j
56	public class ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl implements ModuleConstraintExecutor {
57	
58	    private final Map<Long, Module> moduleMap = new HashMap<>();
59	
60	    private final Map<Long, ModuleAlgClassLoader> moduleAlgClassLoaderMap = new HashMap<>();

66	    @Override
67	    public Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config) {
68	        this.config = config;
69	        log.info("Module constraint executor initialized");
70	        return Result.success(null);

72	
73	    @Override
74	    public final Result<Void> fini() {
75	        // 销毁所有扩展处理器
76	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
77	            process.destroy();
78	        }
79	        extensibleProcesses.clear();
80	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.clear();
81	        moduleMap.clear();
82	        log.info("Module constraint executor finalized");
83	        return Result.success(null);
84	    }
85	
86	    @Override
87	    public final Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules) {
88	        if (modules == null) {
89	            return Result.failed("modules is null");
90	        }
91	        for (Module m : modules) {
92	            if (m == null) {
93	                continue;
94	            }
95	            moduleMap.put(m.getId(), m);
96	            m.init();
97	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = ModuleAlgClassLoader.newInstance(config, m.getAlg());
98	            loader.init();
99	            moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.put(m.getId(), loader);
100	        }
101	        log.info("Added modules: {}", modules.length);
102	        return Result.success(null);
103	    }

113	    @Override
114	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
115	        return processProduct(module, partCategoryReq);
116	    }
